req: 5+ years of product management experience in SaaS. Strong understanding of Agile methodologies. Experience with product analytics tools (Mixpanel, Amplitude). Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills. MBA or equivalent experience preferred.
notes: Comprehensive benefits package. Equity participation. Flexible schedule. Conference attendance budget. Modern office amenities.
duties: Define product vision and roadmap. Gather and prioritize product requirements. Work with engineering and design teams. Analyze product metrics and user feedback. Present product updates to executive leadership.
selection: Selection process includes product case study, stakeholder management scenario, strategic thinking assessment, and executive interview.
